HumaLation

Beyond Words, Into Deep Meaning.

The world's first AI contextual translation platform powered by Claude — delivering culturally resonant, anthropologically intelligent translations across 70 languages in under 30 seconds. Not word-for-word. Human-to-human.

1-ClickYouTube Auto-Register
Process

One Click. 70 Countries.

From your YouTube Studio to global audiences — fully automated, culturally intelligent.

01
Install
Install the Chrome Extension from the Web Store. No complex setup — ready in 60 seconds.
02
Open Studio
Open any video in YouTube Studio. The HumaLation button appears automatically.
03
Translate
Claude AI reads your title, description, and keywords — generating culturally resonant translations for all 70 languages.
04
Published
All translations automatically registered in YouTube's subtitle tab. Done in 26 seconds.
Why HumaLation

Not Translation. Transformation.

🧠
Claude AI Engine
Powered by Anthropic's Claude — the most contextually aware AI. Understands cultural nuance, idioms, and local audience psychology.
🌍
70 Languages, 26 Seconds
Title, description, keywords — all 70 countries processed simultaneously. Real parallel processing.
🎯
YouTube SEO Optimized
Translations crafted for click-through rate, not just accuracy. Local search patterns, trending keywords, platform-native phrasing.
⚡
1-Click Auto-Register
Directly writes to YouTube's subtitle system. No copy-paste. No manual entry. Every translation lands exactly where it needs to be.
🔒
Google-Free Architecture
Zero dependency on Google Translate API. Processed through Claude exclusively — no usage limits, no quality compromise.
📦
Pro Bundle Tools
Video upscaler, Shorts generator, thumbnail creator, image upscaler — the complete creator toolkit in one subscription.
